_meta.purpose: Hand-picked product/competitor-match test fixture for crawmatic, sourced live from mushtryati.com (WooCommerce) and cross-checked against jarir.com, noon.com, amazon.sa (all KSA storefronts).

confidence_levels.high: Exact SKU/ASIN or identical spec string confirmed on the competitor page
confidence_levels.medium: Same model line confirmed but a spec (RAM/connectivity/storage) differs slightly, or exact variant not isolated from a category/variant-selector page
confidence_levels.gap: No matching listing found on this competitor after multiple search attempts — kept as a deliberate negative test case

_meta.note: amazon.sa URLs are the bare canonical https://www.amazon.sa/dp/{ASIN} form (Amazon always accepts this, slug is decorative/optional) rather than the full pretty-URL form. url_pattern grouping/discovery-phase concerns are being handled separately on the crawmatic side.

products.variant_note: Mushtryati sells one fixed config (Silver implied); Amazon/Noon expose Space Black vs Silver as separate listings/options — good test case for option_values reconciliation.

competitor_matches.external_title: Apple Retina XDR Laptop 16" M4 Pro 14-core CPU
Apple MacBook Pro MX2U3 48GB RAM 512GB SSD Silver
Apple 2024 MacBook Pro 16-inch M4 Pro 48GB 512GB - Silver

products.variant_note: Same model line as the WiFi/256GB SKU below; jarir bundles storage/connectivity as options on one product page rather than separate SKUs — reconciliation test case.

competitor_matches.external_title: Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ Tablet - Wi-Fi 11" Grey (128GB/256GB options on page)
competitor_matches.note: Jarir's page exposes Wi-Fi only; no separate 5G SKU found — treat as closest variant-group match, not exact connectivity match.

Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+, 5G, Silver, 6GB RAM, 128GB Storage (KSA Version)
